[[7 ABY/Legends|7]]–[[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]<ref name="Day at the Races">"[[A Day at the Races]]" is set prior to the [[Thrawn campaign]] but after the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Liberation of Coruscant]], events which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] and [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]] respectively.</ref>

"'''A Day at the Races'''" is a short story written by [[Bill Slavicsek]], originally published in the ''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'' and later archived on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
